plan_followed: _audit/ap-biology/2026-05-18T04-12-13Z-plan.json (slot A's 16-module plan; resumed at the M12 gap)
why_this_run: Slot A (2026-05-21T04:08Z) ran a retroactive 3-reviewer cascade on AP Calculus AB and concluded the reference-doc-backed NEW-content backlog was exhausted. That conclusion overlooked AP Biology M12-M16 (Unit 8 — Ecology), which the 2026-05-19 slot B summary explicitly listed under remaining_for_course. Verification at the start of this run confirmed: (1) AP Biology M1-M11 all carry the 3-reviewer cascade (_review_A/B/C present on every folder) so the earlier 'DO NOT ADD MORE until existing are audited' block is genuinely lifted; (2) references/ap-biology-ced.md contains a complete Unit 8 section mapped to M12-M16; (3) M12-M16 folders did not exist. So genuine rigorous auto-work WAS available. Slot B generated M12 and M13 via the full generator -> 2-round 3-reviewer cascade -> writer pipeline.

produced_detail.title: Module 12: Ecology: Populations
topics_covered: Demography and per-capita growth rate r=(b-d)+(i-e) (clarified as per-capita rates after review)
Exponential J-curve dN/dt=rN, doubling time ~70/r (rule of 70, r as percent)
Logistic S-curve dN/dt=rN(K-N)/K, carrying capacity K with overshoot/oscillation nuance
Density-dependent vs density-independent limiting factors (taught via the mechanism test, not just example lists)
r-selected vs K-selected as a spectrum
Type I/II/III survivorship curves mapped to life history
ap_traps_inoculated: K is not a hard never-exceeded ceiling
r/K is a spectrum not a binary
produced_detail.audit_verdict: needs_review (driven solely by the by-design 'No MP4 found' major + 1 AP-naming note)

produced_detail.title: Module 13: Community Ecology

round_1.C: minor (flagged the 10-15% exam-weight as unsupported only because the CED unit-weighting table line was not in its excerpt; the figure IS in the CED)

topics_covered: Six interspecific interactions and their +/-/0 signs (competition, predation, herbivory, parasitism, mutualism, commensalism)
Competitive exclusion (Gause) and resource partitioning (MacArthur warblers)
Fundamental vs realized niche (shrinkage named to competition/predation after review)
Coevolutionary defenses; Batesian (palatable mimic of defended model) vs Mullerian (multiple defended share a pattern), viceroy/monarch 'reconsidered' caveat preserved
Keystone species (Paine's Pisaster, Yellowstone wolves) defined by disproportionate impact, distinguished from trophic cascade
Primary vs secondary succession keyed on soil
Species diversity: richness vs evenness, Shannon H, diversity->stability (hedged as correlation)
ap_traps_inoculated: +/-/0 sign confusion (mutualism vs commensalism vs parasitism)
produced_detail.post_writer_fix: Audit flagged a 'no assignment/practice/portal next-action language' minor. Slot B edited 16_path narration ('Practice the Khan Academy ... problem sets', 'complete the Unit Eight assignment') to satisfy the AGENT_RECIPE concrete-Learn-Portal-action rule. No slide rebuild needed (narration-only). Score 73 -> 79.

throughput: 2 modules through the full 2-round 3-reviewer cascade (12 review JSON files total: 6 round-1 + 6 round-2) + writer + slide build + contact sheet. Peak parallel sub-agents: 6 (the round-1 and round-2 reviewer fan-outs). Matches the sanctioned 2026-05-19 slot B pace of 2 modules with the cascade fully honored.
anomalies: Slot A's 2026-05-21 AP Calc summary asserted the reference-doc-backed new-content backlog was EXHAUSTED. This was an oversight: AP Biology M12-M16 (Unit 8 Ecology) were genuinely missing, CED-backed, and unblocked. Slot B picked them up. Lesson for future slots: 'backlog exhausted' claims should be cross-checked against each course's prior remaining_for_course list before defaulting to audit-only work.

ap-biology-module-10-natural-selection-v2 is the recognized 'M10 V2 pilot' (ROADMAP 2026-05-19 Later 10, audit score 99) with a .cleaned marker, _review_*_v2pilot.json files, and a youtube key in script.json. It is a deliberate experiment, NOT a broken/stray folder. Left untouched.

Two _audit locations exist in the repo: root /_audit/<course>/ (where AP Biology history lives) and /teaching-videos/_audit/<course>/ (where slot A wrote the 2026-05-21 AP Calc cascade). This summary was written to the root location to sit alongside the biology plan it resumed. A future cleanup could consolidate to one location.
next_slot_recommendations: Slot A (11pm CT) or next Slot B: resume the SAME 2026-05-18 AP Biology plan and generate M14 (folder already created, empty), then M15 and M16, each through the full 2-round 3-reviewer cascade against the Unit 8 CED. That completes AP Biology 16/16.

After AP Biology is complete, the reference-doc-backed backlog is truly exhausted (AP CS A and AP Psychology have script.json but NO CED reference doc, so Reviewer C cannot run; AP Calc is done). At that point a human must add references/<slug>-ced.md (e.g. ap-cs-a-ced.md, ap-psychology-ced.md) to unblock either retroactive cascades for those courses or new courses (AP Statistics, Geometry, Chemistry, US History, etc., which have prisma defs but no teaching-videos folders).
